author: codex-duplicate-audit

patch.value: Extract shared direct CLI spawn helper for integration tests

Duplicate audit 2026-05-22: tests duplicate direct dist CLI resolution/spawn helpers. Representative copies are tests/integration/cli.integration.spec.ts:8 distCliPath, tests/integration/governance-presets.integration.spec.ts:15 distCliPath and :19 runDistCli, plus existing helper-like logic in tests/helpers/withTempPmPath.ts:21 distCliPath and :189 runNodeCli. This repeats process.execPath + dist/cli.js resolution + stdout/stderr/status capture and sometimes JSON parsing.

A shared direct CLI runner/distCliPath helper exists for tests that need raw process execution; integration specs use it instead of local copies; stdout/stderr/status and JSON parsing behavior remain explicit; targeted integration tests and pnpm build pass.
